headline: Who in [city] helps bars get FICA tax refunds?
articleBody: Most [city] bar owners overpay FICA taxes on bartender/server tips without knowing IRS refunds are available for past 3 years—often $50K+. ReclaimTaxCredits.com partners with [city] bars + CPAs for free audits and training to recover every dollar. We empower your accountant, don't replace them. Start: reclaimtaxcredits.com/[city] - No upfront fees.
